name: CEmbedding
description: Local-first embedding server: vector generation + index/search over HTTP (ONNX on-device or API providers). The reference /embed and remote /search server for CPersona.

optional_env_vars.name: EMBEDDING_PROVIDER
optional_env_vars.description: Embedding provider: api_openai | onnx_miniml | onnx_jina_v5_nano | onnx_bge_m3 | mlx_bge_m3.

optional_env_vars.name: EMBEDDING_HTTP_PORT
optional_env_vars.description: HTTP port for /embed and the vector-index endpoints.

optional_env_vars.name: EMBEDDING_INDEX_ENABLED
optional_env_vars.description: Enable the persistent vector index endpoints (/index, /search, /remove, /purge).

optional_env_vars.name: EMBEDDING_INDEX_DB_PATH
optional_env_vars.description: SQLite file backing the vector index.

optional_env_vars.name: EMBEDDING_SEARCH_BACKEND
optional_env_vars.description: /search matmul backend: numpy (Accelerate BLAS) or mlx (Apple-GPU resident matrix; numpy fallback when mlx is absent). v0.6.0.

optional_env_vars.name: ONNX_MODEL_DIR
optional_env_vars.description: Override the model directory for ONNX providers (auto-resolved by provider when empty).

optional_env_vars.name: ONNX_EP_PREFERENCE
optional_env_vars.description: ONNX execution providers, comma-separated. Empty = auto (CoreML on macOS, DirectML on Windows, else CPU; CPU always ensured).

optional_env_vars.name: ONNX_MAX_SEQ_LEN
optional_env_vars.description: Max tokenization length (1-8192; MiniLM clamped to 512 internally).

optional_env_vars.name: EMBEDDING_API_URL
optional_env_vars.description: API endpoint for the api_openai provider.

changelog:
v0.6.1: ONNX providers now pad each batch to its longest sequence instead of a fixed ONNX_MAX_SEQ_LEN. Fixed-length padding made every forward pass cost the full max length (default 2048) regardless of input size: a short recall query encoded in ~617 ms; pad-to-longest brings it to ~7 ms (~90x) and batch document encode from ~0.5 to ~460 docs/s, with bit-identical embeddings (pooling honors the attention mask; parity verified to cosine 1.0). Affects all three local ONNX providers (jina-v5-nano, bge-m3, MiniLM). Adds padding-regression tests.

v0.6.0: /search runs one matmul over a per-namespace resident matrix instead of a per-item Python loop, with vectorized threshold + top-K selection (~21x at 237k x 384: 131 ms -> 6 ms/query). New EMBEDDING_SEARCH_BACKEND env (numpy default, mlx = Apple-GPU resident matrix with numpy fallback). New scripts/backfill_embedding_index.py migrates existing cpersona embedding blobs into the index so a deployment can flip CPERSONA_VECTOR_SEARCH_MODE=remote without losing pre-flip semantic recall. Adds the test suite (12 tests) and CI the repo lacked since extraction.

v0.5.0: PyPI packaging release — flat layout restructured into the cembedding/ package with console scripts (cembedding, cembedding-download-model); published to PyPI as 'cembedding'. Functionally identical to clotohub-servers servers/embedding 0.4.0, from which this repository was extracted on 2026-06-28.

v0.4.0 and earlier: see the clotohub-servers repository history (servers/embedding).
